# GLI-FLOW Terms of Service

**Last Updated:** 2026-06-03

## 1. Intellectual Property Ownership

**You retain all intellectual property rights to your design files, RTL, and all artifacts generated by GLI-FLOW from your designs.**

Green Lantern Industries (tapeitout.com) claims no ownership, license, or rights to:
- Your Verilog or VHDL source files
- Your SystemVerilog source files
- Your constraint files (SDC, XDC)
- Your GDS output files
- Any netlist, DEF, or intermediate file generated from your designs
- Any proprietary information contained in your design files

## 2. Telemetry Data

GLI-FLOW collects anonymized execution telemetry to improve the platform. This telemetry:
- Contains only execution metrics (timing values, cell counts, runtime statistics)
- NEVER contains your RTL source code
- NEVER contains module names or signal names from your design
- NEVER contains your GDS geometry data
- Is fully described at tapeitout.com/privacy

You may opt out of telemetry at any time:
  gli-flow config --telemetry off

## 3. Data Retention

Your design files and artifacts are retained for 90 days from last access. You may request deletion at any time by contacting support@tapeitout.com. Deletion is confirmed within 48 hours.

## 4. No Warranty

GLI-FLOW is provided "as is." Green Lantern Industries provides no warranty that designs processed by GLI-FLOW will successfully tapeout or function as intended.

[Full legal review required before publication]
